nasb.text: So it came about when Moses held his hand up, that Israel prevailed, and when he let his hand down, Amalek prevailed.

esv.text: Whenever Moses held up his hand, Israel prevailed, and whenever he lowered his hand, Amalek prevailed.

cnv.text: 摩西舉起手來的時候，以色列人就得勝；摩西把手放下來的時候，亞瑪力人就得勝。

ccb.text: 摩西什么时候举手，以色列人就得胜；他的手什么时候垂下来，亚玛力人就占上风。
